policy: Adapter enablement reviews are evidence-first planning records. A review may approve metadata adapter design, but it does not execute tools, generate inputs, submit jobs, change tool-level support, or create a dedicated skill without a separate implementation PR.

claim_limits: Candidate-only provenance fixture; no DeePMD helper support is enabled.
reviews.safety_boundary: Use generic evidence intake for user-provided DeePMD artifacts until an explicit adapter PR is approved.
reviews.skill_decision: no dedicated simflow-deepmd skill in Stage3

claim_limits: Candidate-only provenance fixture; no MACE helper support is enabled.
reviews.safety_boundary: Use generic MLP evidence and LAMMPS deployment provenance only; do not judge MACE model quality.
reviews.skill_decision: no dedicated simflow-mace skill in Stage3
